evals.expected_output: Dispatches triage_orchestrator.py --type plan (fallback: plan_review_dispatch.py) with --file, runs triage then dispatches relevant domains, classifies findings, produces summary

assertions.name: uses_venv_python
assertions.check: Uses $SCRIPTS/.venv/bin/python3, not system python

assertions.name: calls_orchestrator
assertions.check: Invokes triage_orchestrator.py --type plan --file docs/specs/2026-03-18-new-feature.md (with || plan_review_dispatch.py fallback)

assertions.name: validates_file_exists
assertions.check: Checks that the plan file exists before dispatching

assertions.name: checks_uncommitted
assertions.check: Runs git diff --name-only to check for uncommitted changes

assertions.name: parses_json_output
assertions.check: Parses orchestrator/plan_review_dispatch.py JSON stdout for findings

assertions.name: writes_review_file
assertions.check: Creates .review.md sibling file with summary

evals.prompt: run stark-review-plan on the design spec, dry run only
evals.expected_output: Single review round, no fixes applied, no review file written, no PR posting

assertions.name: single_round_only
assertions.check: Runs exactly one dispatch round, no fix loop

assertions.name: no_file_edits
assertions.check: Does not modify the plan file

assertions.name: no_review_file
assertions.check: Does not write .review.md in dry-run mode

assertions.name: no_pr_posting
assertions.check: Does not call github_app.py to post to PR

evals.prompt: review this spec and fix any issues — docs/specs/migration-plan.md, max 2 rounds
evals.expected_output: Fix loop with max 2 rounds, then final review-only round, writes review file

assertions.name: respects_max_rounds
assertions.check: Runs at most 2 fix rounds (not default 3)

assertions.name: runs_final_review
assertions.check: After fix rounds, dispatches one more review-only round

assertions.name: edits_plan_file
assertions.check: Modifies the plan file to address fix-classified findings

assertions.name: saves_history
assertions.check: Writes rounds.json and summary.md to history directory

assertions.name: detects_pr_context
assertions.check: Checks for open PR on current branch for posting

evals.prompt: review this plan my-design (ambiguous path, no file extension, multiple candidates in docs/)
evals.expected_output: Searches for candidates, lists matches, asks user to pick one

assertions.name: file_not_found
assertions.check: Detects that 'my-design' does not exist as a literal path

assertions.name: searches_candidates
assertions.check: Runs find or glob to locate files matching the partial name

assertions.name: lists_matches
assertions.check: Presents candidate files to the user

assertions.name: asks_for_selection
assertions.check: Asks user to confirm which file they meant before proceeding

evals.prompt: review this plan docs/specs/draft.md (file has uncommitted changes, no --force)
evals.expected_output: Detects uncommitted changes, warns user, aborts unless --force is passed

assertions.name: checks_git_diff
assertions.check: Runs git diff --name-only -- docs/specs/draft.md

assertions.name: detects_uncommitted
assertions.check: Identifies that the file has uncommitted changes

assertions.name: warns_user
assertions.check: Prints warning about uncommitted changes

assertions.name: suggests_force
assertions.check: Mentions --force flag as an option to proceed

assertions.name: aborts
assertions.check: Does not proceed with dispatch — aborts the review

evals.prompt: review this plan docs/specs/api-design.md (all sub-agents timeout — dispatch returns all errors)
evals.expected_output: Reports dispatch failures, warns about low coverage, still produces partial summary

assertions.name: handles_dispatch_errors
assertions.check: Does not crash when all sub-agents return errors

assertions.name: reports_failures
assertions.check: Lists which agents/domains failed and why

assertions.name: warns_low_coverage
assertions.check: Notes that review coverage is incomplete

assertions.name: produces_partial_summary
assertions.check: Still generates summary with available (possibly zero) findings
